original_image_tags: A scanned archival document page showing a typewritten letter that appears as a "bleed-through" from the reverse side. The text is faint and mirrored, making it difficult to read. Multiple archival stamps are visible, some oriented correctly and some upside-down.

elements.description: The back of a folded document showing faint, reverse-bleed text from the front side, along with several visible stamps and handwritten annotations.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page shows the back of a document with faint reversed bleed-through text and multiple archival stamps, with no contradictions on visual elements or quoted text.
